ValidationRule.description: Asset Name cannot be edited - ALR-688
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $Permission.EHISBypassValidationRuleCustomPermission ), ISCHANGED( Name ), AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName='Unit_Request_Record_Type', RecordType.DeveloperName='Units_Record_Type')), NOT( ISNEW()), OR(AND(PRIORVALUE(Name) <> Name, Name <> 'Unit-'+ TEXT(Type__c)+'-'+ TEXT( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), ISNULL(Parent.Id)= true), AND(PRIORVALUE(Name) <> Name, Name <> 'UnitRequest-'+ TEXT(Type__c)+'-'+ TEXT( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), ISNULL(Parent.Id)= false) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Asset Name field cannot be edited.
